resources.string: Omega-level mutant with telepathic powers ranging up to 250 miles, unaided.
Animalistic brawler with high-level regenerative healing and adamantium-laced skeleton.
Omega-level mutant with control over atmospheric and meteorological phenomena.
A charming mutant from Louisiana with the ability to charge objects with explosive energy.
A Southern belle whose power involves absorbing the memories, abilities, and life force of anyone she touches.
Brilliant, simian-like mutant who combines genius-level intellect with superhuman physical abilities.
